memories.memory: 【John's Career Change】On August 06, 2022 at 01:45 PM, John told James that he had left his IT job after 3 years because he wanted something that makes a difference and that he is happy about the decision and loving the new job. James acknowledged and asked how it felt. John said that at first it was scary, but he knew he had to make a change and focus on things that align with his values and passions. James called it brave and hoped it would bring him joy and satisfaction. John responded that it wasn't easy, but sometimes you gotta take a leap to follow your heart. James stated that taking risks pays off and that he is proud of John. John added that James's support means a lot, and that lately he has been thinking about what truly makes him happy, and he is drawn to the gaming industry, passionate about it, and wants to turn that into a career by becoming an organizer of tournaments for various computer games in our state, for example CS:GO; it's a new journey for me. 【Fortnite Plan】On August 06, 2022, at 01:45 PM, James asked which other game John would organize competitions for and what his plan was. John replied that he can host Fortnite competitions, has already established connections to assist, and his plan is to gain more experience and perfect his skills to be successful in this field. James noted that trying different game genres can widen his skills and knowledge. 【James' Support】Session: James' Support; Session Date: August 06, 2022. On August 06, 2022 at 01:45 PM, John thanked James for supporting him in his new endeavor; James said he would always be there and that if John needs any financial assistance or advice, he should contact James. 【Catch-Up with John】On August 06, 2022, at 01:45 PM, John stated, "I will definitely do this if necessary," and asked, "What's new with you?" He also shared an image showing a desk with a computer monitor and keyboard.

【John life updates】Session Date: September 20, 2022. On September 20, 2022 at 08:56 PM, John said it had been a few days since they chatted and that lots of stuff was going on in his life. 【Emotions (John & James)】On July 09, 2022 at 05:13 PM, John reported feeling tugged by emotion, being determined and passionate on one hand but overwhelmed and stressed on the other, and that balancing personal and professional life is challenging; he asked James how he has been. James replied that staying balanced can be tough, he is trying to take breaks from his hobbies and do other things; lately he has become interested in extreme sports, and yesterday he was rope jumping, the highest height he jumped from being 150 meters. 【Coding Project】Session Date: April 23, 2022. At 11:04 AM, John stated he has been super busy at work with deadlines all over the place and much to do, and that it has been really hectic. James noted that work can be tough and asked whether something specific is making it worse. John said the project is giving him a hard time; it is a difficult coding assignment; he is stuck and frustrated by not making progress. James asked what is giving trouble and offered assistance. John said the coding is really tough; he is working on something complicated and it's not going well; he has been staring at it for ages and feels like he is getting nowhere. James asked what the problem with the project was and whether he can help brainstorm ideas. John replied that would be great; he is trying to make this new algorithm work better but is stuck and asked for any ideas. 【Algorithm】Session Date: April 23, 2022. 11:04 AM: James expressed uncertainty about the algorithm and advised breaking it down into smaller steps, researching similar algorithms, and asking other programmers for advice, and he urged seeking help, noting that every problem has a solution. 11:04 AM: John agreed that breaking the task into smaller steps and seeking help can be helpful and said he would give it a try. 11:04 AM: James replied, "No problem John. 【John】[June 19, 2022, 09:59 PM] John 观察到照片中一只狗和一只猫在沙发上依偎，传达爱与喜悦，并表示最近几天促使他思考自己的未来；他自述有执行力和热情，想通过志愿服务和非营利工作将热情与能力用于关心的事业。 James 表示找到改变世界的途径很重要，问他是否已有具体办法。 John 回答已在考虑志愿服务并进入非营利领域，将热情与能力用于关心的事业。 James 分享了一张上月志愿时拍摄的照片，显示一群人站在建筑物外，表示通过小小的善举也能产生巨大的影响。 John 询问能否看到善举的影响，以及想了解参与的组织的更多信息。 James 描述自己志愿的组织为向较不幸人群提供必需物品，表示看到帮助他人如此微小的善举也能带来意义，感到非常有成就感。 John 认为这是他需要的，并问本周末能否带他去现场。 James 表示当然可以，现场仍有一些先前的工作人员，能够把他介绍给他们。 John 还分享了一张照片，显示一名小男孩站在黄色建筑外，问是否需要进行面试。 James 回答不需要，友善、礼貌、并具有强烈帮助他人的愿望就足够，相信他会成功。 John 对支持表示感谢，表示决心在 James 的帮助下让世界变得更美好、并相信能够实现目标。 James 表示我们可以一起做到。 John 再次感谢并重申决心产生积极影响。 James 鼓励道：你可以的！专注于你的梦想，不要放弃。

【John's Career Change】On August 06, 2022 at 01:45 PM, John told James that he had left his IT job after 3 years because he wanted something that makes a difference and that he is happy about the decision and loving the new job. James called it brave and hoped it would bring him joy and satisfaction. John responded that it wasn't easy, but sometimes you gotta take a leap to follow your heart. James stated that taking risks pays off and that he is proud of John. John added that James's support means a lot, and that lately he has been thinking about what truly makes him happy, and he is drawn to the gaming industry, passionate about it, and wants to turn that into a career by becoming an organizer of tournaments for various computer games in our state, for example CS:GO; it's a new journey for me. 【Fortnite Plan】On August 06, 2022, at 01:45 PM, James asked which other game John would organize competitions for and what his plan was. He also shared an image showing a desk with a computer monitor and keyboard.

【CS:GO & Gaming Update】On March 27, 2022, 12:40 AM, John reported that he had a big win in his game last week, advancing to the next level, which was a huge confidence booster and made him feel he had achieved something; he complemented James and asked if there was anything new he would recommend. James replied that he had just acquired a new cutting-edge gaming system with incredible graphics, has been playing all kinds of new games to relax after work, and can connect with friends who share his passion for gaming. John noted that since they last spoke he had the chance to go to a gaming convention; it was amazing, he tried loads of games, met developers, and even took part in a tournament—unreal; he shared a photo of the convention showing a crowded convention hall with a large crowd of people. James asked what game it was for. John replied that he played his favorite CS:GO game in an intense tournament; it was awesome to see all the skilled players competing. James said that must have been thrilling to watch those skilled players, and that gaming is awesome with all the competition. John agreed it was amazing and that watching those skilled players inspired him to improve his own gaming skills. James added that learning from experienced gamers can really help you level up and encouraged him to keep it up. 【John & James Goals】On March 27, 2022, at 12:40 AM, John stated that he is always looking to up his game and hit new goals, and that commitment extends to his hobbies and other activities; he asked what James has been doing to stay motivated. James replied that setting small goals and tracking progress helps him stay motivated and focused. John then added that setting small goals and tracking progress is a great way to stay motivated, helps stay on track and celebrate progress, and asked whether James is working on anything specific or upcoming challenges he is pumped about. 【RPGs & Genres】[Session Date: March 27, 2022] On March 27, 2022, at 12:40 AM, James stated that he is getting into different types of games now, such as RPGs and strategy games, and that it's really exciting; he also said he is super hyped to explore different game genres and asked what’s in store. John: I'm glad you found someone other than dogs that brings you joy; you will succeed. James: Thanks, John. Samantha and I are going to a baseball game next Sunday; join? I'll show you what Samantha looks like. John: Yeah, let's do it; it'll be a fun experience. John: I really hope so too. Do you have anything new besides the great news about you and Samantha? 【James】September 04, 2022, 09:23 PM: James reports that in the few days since they spoke there have been both good and bad events; yesterday at the theater, Samantha loves theater; I asked her to become my girlfriend and she agreed; we have gone through a lot in this short period, with good and bad, and I am happy with her; the ups and downs were overwhelming but part of life; what about you, what is new in your life?

【Starbucks】On August 26, 2022, at 09:18 PM, James asked, "Are you free tomorrow?" John replied, "Yes, tomorrow is my day off. Do you have any suggestions on how to spend tomorrow?" James answered, "Yes, we can go to Starbucks for coffee if you want." [Image shared by James: a photo of a laptop computer with a colorful keyboard on a table] John said, "I don't mind meeting up, but why Starbucks? Maybe we can have a beer somewhere?" 【McGee's Pub】On August 26, 2022, at 09:18 PM, James proposed going to McGee's Pub, noting they serve a great stout; John stated he does not like dark beer and asked if there is something else there; James replied that there are light beers; John agreed and said see you tomorrow at McGee's Pub; James said see you John, bye.

【McGee's Bar Proximity】2022年10月31日凌晨12:37，James 告诉 Samantha，他和 Samantha 已决定同居。这是一个互相且信息充分的决定。他们租了一套离 McGee's bar 不远的公寓。John 表示这是一个非常重大的决定，并询问他们将住在哪里。John 问及他们是否喜欢在这家酒吧度过时光。James 表示他们确实喜欢它，并坦言，选择公寓时的其中一个条件就是这家酒吧就在附近。
[October 31, 2022, 12:37 AM] James: I actually have 【John and James Support】2022年10月31日凌晨12:37，John与James在对话中互相表达支持：John表示兴奋并请James告知进展、祝好运；James表示将保持更新、对John的支持表示感谢并请保重；John表示愿随时在他需要时提供帮助、祝对方平安、稍后再聊；James再次表示感谢、愿保持联系并愿对方平安、再联系；James还分享了一张照片，内容是一名男子和两只狗在田野里奔跑。

【John and James: Beach Outing】Session Date: August 10, 2022. At 09:16 AM, John asked James what was new. James stated that yesterday he took his three dogs to a beach outing to have fun and bond with other dogkeepers. John shared an image—a photo of a refrigerator with a calendar on it and a magnet. 【Samantha】On August 10, 2022 at 09:16 AM, James said he had fun and met one beautiful girl, was thinking of asking her out on a date, she left him her phone number, and he would call tomorrow; John replied, "Wow! That's cool, what's her name? Be sure to call her, everything will work out!"; James responded, "She is Samantha. I'll definitely call her!"

【James's Sketches】Session Date: September 18, 2022. At 06:02 PM on September 18, 2022, James said he had made some sketches and notes and would grab them. Image shared by James: a photo of a notepad with a drawing of a guitar. 【Music with James and John】Session Date: September 18, 2022. At 06:02 PM, John asked whether James likes music or if it relates to his castle dream. James replied that music is a big part of his life and has nothing to do with castles, and asked what kind of music John likes and whether he plays any instruments; image shared by James: a photo of a desk with a laptop, headphones, and a monitor. At 06:02 PM, John said he is into electronic and rock music and used to play drums when younger but hasn't in a while, and asked James if he plays any instruments. At 06:02 PM, James said rock's awesome and he used to play a guitar when younger but hasn't in a while. At 06:02 PM, John said playing drums when he was younger was a fun way to let off steam and shared an image of an old drum set he used to play on; image shared by John: a photo of a drum set up in a recording studio. At 06:02 PM, James asked if John has ever been in a band or just jammed with friends. At 06:02 PM, John said he has jammed with friends before, it was a lot of fun. At 06:02 PM, James said jamming with friends is always a blast and asked if John has any recordings or videos of those sessions. At 06:02 PM, John said no recordings or videos from the jams; it was about the experience and the moment.

【Family Game Night】All messages were exchanged on August 21, 2022 at 03:57 PM. John recalled that when he was younger his siblings organized a gaming marathon, they stayed up all night and it bonded them; he also shared an image: a photo of two children sitting on a couch with a baby. James asked whether John still plays with his siblings; John replied that he and his siblings do not hang out much because they live far apart, but when they meet they always try to plan a gaming night. James asked if any gaming nights are planned in the near future; John said he is organizing one with his siblings next month (September 2022) and they are stoked, they can't wait. James commented that family game nights are fun and wished him a great time. John thanked James, saying it was nice catching up. James stated that it is good to talk and to have fun at family game night and to talk later.

【Daisy the Labrador】Daisy the Labrador; Session Date: May 04, 2022. At 07:01 PM, John asked what type they were. James replied that one of them, Daisy, is a Labrador; she loves to play with her toys, but most of all she loves to eat. John then asked about the other two, “Judging by the photo, shepherds?” James answered, “Exactly!” and stated that the other two are shepherds. He added that they bring him much joy and that loyalty is their main feature. 【James' happiness】[Session Date: May 04, 2022]

[May 04, 2022, 07:01 PM] James: I'm definitely in next time; hanging out with friends and unwinding is key; today I decided to spend time with my beloved pets again. [Image shared by James: a photo of two dogs playing in a fenced in area]

[May 04, 2022, 07:01 PM] John: What else brings you happiness?

[May 04, 2022, 07:01 PM] James: My pets, computer games, travel and pizza are all that bring me happiness in life.

【John and James' Elementary Skateboarding Photo】On July 22, 2022, at 09:49 AM, John referenced a photo from elementary school showing a group of children holding a skateboard and asked James to remember it. James said it looked fun but did not remember the circumstances under which the picture was taken and asked for the story behind it. John explained that the photo was from when they were 10 and into skateboarding; they had a group of friends who often went to the skate park with them, they would help each other learn new tricks and have a great time, and those friends made the experience better and their friendship mattered to them. James recalled that they loved skateboards back then, sometimes left class early to skateboard, and that he still enjoys riding and taught his dogs how to balance on it, sharing an image of a small dog standing on a skateboard. John asked whether the dogs enjoy it or need encouragement; James replied that they love it, chase after the board, and run with it, providing exercise. John added that staying active and happy is good for both of them, and James concluded that staying active with the dogs builds a strong bond and makes them happy.

【Content】Session Date: April 20, 2022. At 09:32 PM on April 20, 2022, John told James that last Tuesday he met three cool new friends in his programming course; they share the same passion as him, and it's cool to grow his social circle. Have you had any fun surprises lately?

【Pizza】[Session Date: May 04, 2022] At 07:01 PM, John asked, 'Pizza? Cool, I love pizza too! Which one do you love the most?' James replied, 'Pepperoni of course! An amazing combination of spicy salami and cheese.' John said, 'Cool, but my favorite thing is Hawaiian pizza. This combination of sweet and salty delights me! What other pizza do you like?' John shared an image of a pizza with pineapples and ham on a wooden board. James said, 'I like also cheese pizza and prosciutto.' John said, 'Haven't tried prosciutto yet, but I've heard it`s great!' James replied, 'Give it a shot! It`s really great. No regrets, I promise.' John said, 'Got it, will check it out. Thanks!' James added, 'Be sure to tell us your impressions when you try it! And Bon Appetit!' John concluded, 'Thanks! Catch you later!'

6.mflow_response: They both enjoy a good lager.

【Freelance Website Project】Session Date: April 29, 2022. On April 29, 2022, at 02:36 PM, James asked John what was up. 【John's Gaming Interests】2022年8月10日09:16，John与James的对话如下。John表示最近在思考自己的热情与目标，感谢James鼓励他尝试新游戏类型。James回应很高兴听到对方来信，表示聊天产生了影响，并询问John想探索哪些类型的游戏。John补充，最近在玩策略和RPG等与以往射击不同的游戏类型，并且已经在考虑为它们举办比赛。James称这是好事，认为尝试不同类型的游戏能丰富体验，并询问是否有值得关注的游戏。John最终说他新上手了一款RPG，叙事和角色都很出色，欲罢不能。
[August 10, 2022, 09:16 AM] John: Hey James, been 【The Witcher 3】[The Witcher 3] [Session Date: August 10, 2022] On August 10, 2022, at 09:16 AM, James said: "Sounds great! On August 10, 2022, at 09:16 AM, James said: "Yeah, "The Witcher 3" is amazing! I love how you can shape the world with your choices and feel the impact. The graphics are insane too - check out this pic. [Image shared by James: a photo of a man dressed in armor holding a sword]"

【Regional Chess Win】会话日期：2022年11月5日，时间：17:20。John 告诉 James：他在星期二赢得了区域象棋锦标赛，过程紧张但最终取胜；感觉很好，所有努力和练习都得到了回报，克服了挑战，给他带来巨大自信提升，他为自己感到骄傲。
[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] John: Hey James! Wow, 【Strategy & Improvement】[Strategy & Improvement]
[Session Date: November 05, 2022]

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] James: 赢得比赛肯定感觉很棒。赢得比赛时是什么感觉以及你用来准备的策略是什么？

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] John: 我的策略是分析并预测对手的走棋，以保持领先一步。

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] James: 很棒！学习棋局以获得优势才是关键。你有什么提升的建议吗？

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] John: 是的，研究开局和策略确实很有帮助。它设定基调并打下坚实的基础。向有经验的棋手学习并分析过往对局也很重要。此外，你之前给我的关于开局的棋艺建议也有帮助。你想要一些关于开局的资源吗？ 【Openings Resources】On November 05, 2022, at 05:20 PM, James expressed interest in resources on chess openings and thanked; John replied that he had it covered and provided a helpful resource for chess openings, with an image shared by John showing a photo of a book with a list of the different games. 【Current Games & Recommendations】Session Date: November 05, 2022. At 05:20 PM on November 05, 2022, James asked John: "What games are you currently playing?" and stated he is always looking for new recommendations.

【John and James Chat】On April 04, 2022 at 02:13 PM, John asked James about any new games. James replied that he joined an online gaming tournament yesterday; it was intense and fun, with a photo report: an image of a group of people posing for a picture. He did pretty well, reaching the semifinals and winning some rounds, and a screenshot of his character was shared: an image of a man in a costume standing in front of a sign. John congratulated him on reaching the semifinals and asked how the final rounds turned out. James said the final rounds were tough; he tried his best but didn’t make it, it was close, and he had a blast competing with talented players, looking forward to the next tournament: an image of a man in a costume holding a sword. John asked if he met any famous players there. James said he met the whole team; it’s a pity he didn’t get a chance to take a photo with them, but one of them gave him a couple of gaming tips: an image of a man sitting in a chair playing a video game. John remarked that the advice would help him develop in the game. James added that the whole team gave him autographs, and he was very happy about this: an image of a notepad with a pen and a glass of water. John asked what advice he remembered most; James stated that the most important thing is to communicate correctly with the team and never put your ego above team success: an image of a group of people standing around a table. John noted that comms and teamwork are super important in gaming, and asked how he usually communicates with his team. James replied that he usually uses voice chat to communicate with his team, it’s fast and helps them work together effectively: an image of a man sitting in a chair playing a video game. 【Apex Legends】April 04, 2022, 02:13 PM — John asked what game James likes to play with his team and noted that communication helps. April 04, 2022, 02:13 PM — James replied that he has been playing his favourite game Apex Legends with his team; it's intense, and he shared a screenshot of them playing: [Image shared by James: a photo of a video game screen showing a robot and a robot]. April 04, 2022, 02:13 PM — John said Apex Legends looks tough; the graphics are unreal, and he asked how it stacks up against other games. April 04, 2022, 02:13 PM — James stated that Apex Legends has awesome graphics and super fast-paced gameplay and stands out among other games. 【April 04, 2022 Future Games】April 04, 2022; Future Games. Session Date: April 04, 2022; 02:13 PM: John and James discussed upcoming games; James expressed intent to try RPGs and MOBAs and shared an image of a video game cover. John stated that RPGs and MOBAs can be awesome to experience an engaging story or have epic multiplayer fights and asked James to report back on his impressions. James cannot wait to try new genres and will definitely share thoughts once he tries them. John suggested they chat soon. James will keep John updated on all the new games; John asked to be updated on how it goes.

【CS:GO & Gaming Update】On March 27, 2022, 12:40 AM, John reported that he had a big win in his game last week, advancing to the next level, which was a huge confidence booster and made him feel he had achieved something; he complemented James and asked if there was anything new he would recommend. James replied that he had just acquired a new cutting-edge gaming system with incredible graphics, has been playing all kinds of new games to relax after work, and can connect with friends who share his passion for gaming. John noted that since they last spoke he had the chance to go to a gaming convention; it was amazing, he tried loads of games, met developers, and even took part in a tournament—unreal; he shared a photo of the convention showing a crowded convention hall with a large crowd of people. James asked what game it was for. John replied that he played his favorite CS:GO game in an intense tournament; it was awesome to see all the skilled players competing. James said that must have been thrilling to watch those skilled players, and that gaming is awesome with all the competition. John agreed it was amazing and that watching those skilled players inspired him to improve his own gaming skills. James added that learning from experienced gamers can really help you level up and encouraged him to keep it up. 【John & James Goals】On March 27, 2022, at 12:40 AM, John stated that he is always looking to up his game and hit new goals, and that commitment extends to his hobbies and other activities; he asked what James has been doing to stay motivated. James replied that setting small goals and tracking progress helps him stay motivated and focused. John then added that setting small goals and tracking progress is a great way to stay motivated, helps stay on track and celebrate progress, and asked whether James is working on anything specific or upcoming challenges he is pumped about. 【RPGs & Genres】[Session Date: March 27, 2022] On March 27, 2022, at 12:40 AM, James stated that he is getting into different types of games now, such as RPGs and strategy games, and that it's really exciting; he also said he is super hyped to explore different game genres and asked what’s in store. John responded affirmatively, saying that trying new genres is always exciting and that he can't wait to hear about James's journey with them, requesting updates on how it goes. James replied, Got it, John! I'll keep you updated on my gaming adventures with the new genres. John then expressed thanks and said he can't wait to hear about it.

【FIFA 23】[FIFA 23]
[Session Date: November 05, 2022]

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] John: FIFA 23 is a great football game with online multiplayer worldwide; he is hooked.

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] James: I wanted to try a new gaming genre, so I chose sports.

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] John: Practice a little first, then we can play together.

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] James: I hope it's easy to control.

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] John: Not at all; all you need is a gamepad and a sense of timing.

[November 05, 2022, 05:20 PM] James: I'll go train.

James replied, "I can't remember such a game. Maybe you have some other interesting games?" 【Among Us】Session Date: April 29, 2022. On April 29, 2022 at 02:36 PM, James: I've heard of Among Us and been meaning to try it.

【Video Games】March 17, 2022, 03:47 PM: John asked James what motivates him. James stated that video games give him tons of joy and excitement, which keeps him motivated. John asked what game James is currently enjoying the most. 【The Witcher 3】Session Date: March 17, 2022; The Witcher 3. At 03:47 PM, James said he is totally into The Witcher 3; the story and atmosphere are amazing, and he asked whether John has tried it yet. John replied that he hasn't played it yet, but he hears it's awesome and he's going to give it a go. He also said he has just signed up for a programming class and asked whether James has ever done any programming. 【Programming】On March 17, 2022, at 03:47 PM, James said he tried programming once in college and it has become his life, and asked John about his coding experience. John replied that he did a bit of coding in HTML and CSS a few years back and planned to refresh those skills in this course, and he asked James which languages he likes most and about projects. James stated that he has worked with Python and C++, built a website, and created some game mods, and provided an image showing a computer screen displaying a video game scene. John commented that the mod looks amazing and the graphics are awesome, and asked what other programming languages James has worked with. James replied that he hasn’t worked with any other programming languages, but he hopes to work with them in the future.

【Family Game Night】All messages were exchanged on August 21, 2022 at 03:57 PM. John recalled that when he was younger his siblings organized a gaming marathon, they stayed up all night and it bonded them; he also shared an image: a photo of two children sitting on a couch with a baby. James asked whether John still plays with his siblings; John replied that he and his siblings do not hang out much because they live far apart, but when they meet they always try to plan a gaming night. James asked if any gaming nights are planned in the near future; John said he is organizing one with his siblings next month (September 2022) and they are stoked, they can't wait. James commented that family game nights are fun and wished him a great time. John thanked James, saying it was nice catching up. James stated that it is good to talk and to have fun at family game night and to talk later.

【Children's Hospital Gaming Tournament】Session Date: October 31, 2022. October 31, 2022, 12:37 AM: John stated that he held a gaming tournament with his buddies last night, featuring Fortnite and a few other games, and that they raised a decent amount for a children's hospital. James asked who helped out and what other games were played. John added that they also played Overwatch and Apex Legends; the atmosphere was awesome, everyone was competitive, and they raised a good amount for the kids' hospital. James asked for photos from the tournament. 【Tournament Photo Reactions】Session Date: October 31, 2022. At 12:37 AM, John posted that he got a great shot at the tournament and shared an image—a photo of a computer screen with a game menu on it; everyone was so hyped, and it felt great knowing we were playing for a good cause. James commented, 'Wow, this photo rocks!' John replied, 'Thanks! I'm glad you enjoyed it. It was a really awesome moment - unforgettable for all of us! What's new with you?'

【Stamford Pup Adoption】Session Date: April 12, 2022. On April 12, 2022 at 09:52 AM, James informed John that he adopted a pup from a shelter in Stamford last week, named Ned, and that his days have been much happier with him in the family. An image shared by James shows a dog and a cat sitting on a dog bed. James asked John whether there was any progress on his gaming goals. 【James and John RPG Chat】April 12, 2022, 09:52 AM: John congratulated James on getting a pup and said he hasn't made much progress with gaming lately because life is busy with work, but gaming makes him happy and helps forget the stresses of life. James replied that gaming really helps forget the stresses of life, it's like entering another world, and asked whether John has played any interesting games lately. John said he is playing a new RPG with a really cool story and world, akin to being transported to a futuristic dystopia, and attached an image of a city at night. James asked if he will like it and said he is always up for trying new games. John replied: You'll love it; it has a fun story and an awesome world, plus some tough gameplay, but the game is a little laggy and sometimes produces errors; here is one of them that I came across yesterday, and he attached an image of a computer screen with a game. James said the game must still be raw and would rather wait until the bugs are completely fixed, then try it out. John replied that even with minor bugs, the game still looks great: graphics are awesome and the gameplay is super immersive; he is sure James should try it out now and can send a link. James said okay, you've convinced me; he'll wait for the link. John said he would send it and asked to let him know what James thinks after checking it out. James said he would check it out and let John know, and is excited to give it a try. John said thanks and is excited to hear James's thoughts.

6.mflow_response: He is hooked on FIFA 23.

At 06:02 PM, John said no recordings or videos from the jams; it was about the experience and the moment.

【James's Game Bug】On May 04, 2022, at 07:01 PM, John stated he had an eventful week since their last chat. James reported that last Friday a bug in the code disrupted the game mechanics on a project he had been working on for weeks; he nearly finished it but couldn't figure it out, which was super disappointing. John asked what happened with that project. James said he couldn't figure it out on his own, so a group of friends and I teamed up and got it fixed; it took a bit of work, but I'm glad it got done. 【James's Friends】Session Date: May 04, 2022. At 07:01 PM on May 04, 2022, John said, "Cool! Having a reliable team can really make a difference." James replied, "Yeah, totally! It's awesome to have a group of people who share the same passions. They give you help and bring their own ideas to the mix. You can achieve so much when everyone works together. Are you working on anything today?"

【Emotions (John & James)】On July 09, 2022 at 05:13 PM, John reported feeling tugged by emotion, being determined and passionate on one hand but overwhelmed and stressed on the other, and that balancing personal and professional life is challenging; he asked James how he has been. James replied that staying balanced can be tough, he is trying to take breaks from his hobbies and do other things; lately he has become interested in extreme sports, and yesterday he was rope jumping, the highest height he jumped from being 150 meters. John said he relaxes by reading and enjoys entering the imaginative worlds of authors as an escape from reality; [Image shared by John: a photo of a book shelf filled with books and a guitar]. 【Extreme Sports (James)】Extreme Sports (James). Session Date: July 09, 2022. At 05:13 PM on July 09, 2022, John asked James what other extreme sport he had tried. James replied that just three days ago he was surfing; catching a wave is so cool; it's strange, but it relaxes him so much; and he asked how John likes to relax.

【James's Achievements】Session Date: September 20, 2022. At 08:56 PM on September 20, 2022, John congratulated James, stating that he is doing well and that all his hard work is paying off, and shared an image of a card with a graduation cap. At 08:56 PM on September 20, 2022, James replied, thanking John for the support and asking if there are any more big moments recently.

【James's Virtual World】[April 20, 2022, 09:32 PM] James: 上周四我和一位游戏伙伴在一个编程项目中合作，将编程和游戏结合，创造出一个受《巫师3》启发的虚拟世界，看到想法变为现实令人兴奋。

[April 20, 2022, 09:32 PM] John: 把你的技能用在这个项目上一定很棒吧！你有你做的那个世界的截图吗？看到它完整呈现一定很棒！[Image shared by John: a photo of a video game screen with a man on it]

[April 20, 2022, 09:32 PM] James: 这是一次难忘的经历。虽然没有全景虚拟世界的截图，但有我创建的游戏角色的截图。工作量很大，但当一切汇合时回报也很大，令人非常满意！[Image shared by James: a photo of a woman dressed in armor kneeling on a rock]

[April 20, 2022, 09:32 PM] John: 哇，James！这太棒了。我真的能感受到这里的氛围。你是从什么获得灵感的？

[April 20, 2022, 09:32 PM] James: 谢谢，能感觉到氛围我也很高兴。灵感来自两周前与我的狗散步时的一次经历。我们在社区周围散步时，一位陌生人向我们走来。我以前从未在邻近地方见过她。她的眼睛和外貌让我印象深刻，仿佛让我一见钟情。遗憾的是我没有上前去认识她，但我至少记住了她的外貌，并将其形象融入游戏中。

【Bowling】Session Date: March 17, 2022. At 03:47 PM on March 17, 2022, John: It will be great to work with you, James. James: I'll be looking forward to it. James: Yesterday I went bowling and got 2 strikes. I love bowling! John: I'm sure you're very good at this. Unfortunately, I can’t share my love for him with you, my fingers are too big. Perhaps I should take up exercise, at least start going for a run in the morning. And I also don’t like bowling itself, to be honest. James: It's a pity, it would be nice to go play with you one day. 【Slot Machines】Session Date: March 17, 2022. At 03:47 PM, John suggested we could play slot machines and arcades and said he would be nearby to look after pockets. James stated that the last time he played at the slot machines he was so engrossed in the game that he didn't notice his wallet being taken out of his pocket. Sad story. 【VR Gaming】March 17, 2022, 03:47 PM: James proposed trying something different; John suggested VR gaming, noting its immersion and proposing to try it together. James had tried VR and said it felt crazy real and asked if John had tried it; John had tried it a few times and found the immersion insane, and he couldn't wait to try it with James. James said VR gaming is awesome and proposed doing it next Saturday; John agreed.

I kept it a secret because I would have been very upset if I had told you about her in advance and then it wouldn’t have worked out. I’ve been working on this for the past few months and I’m really proud of how it’s turned out. I'm so proud of them! Maybe they'll even create their own video games, huh? Any new game designs on your mind? 【James' project】[James' project]
[Session Date: August 26, 2022]

[August 26, 2022, 09:18 PM] John: James's plan is impressive; it's going to be awesome, and I can't wait to see what James comes up with.

James replied that he had just acquired a new cutting-edge gaming system with incredible graphics, has been playing all kinds of new games to relax after work, and can connect with friends who share his passion for gaming. James said that must have been thrilling to watch those skilled players, and that gaming is awesome with all the competition. John then added that setting small goals and tracking progress is a great way to stay motivated, helps stay on track and celebrate progress, and asked whether James is working on anything specific or upcoming challenges he is pumped about. 【RPGs & Genres】[Session Date: March 27, 2022] On March 27, 2022, at 12:40 AM, James stated that he is getting into different types of games now, such as RPGs and strategy games, and that it's really exciting; he also said he is super hyped to explore different game genres and asked what’s in store. John noted that Witcher 3 had a huge impact on him and asked whether he had plans for future game development. James stated that he put in a lot of effort and it paid off, and that he is ready to make more games in different genres and test out new ideas, and is pumped to see where this journey leads. 【Supportive Partnership】On October 13, 2022 at 02:14 PM, John told James that he can't wait to see where James's journey leads and the new creations he will come up with, praising his determination and love for game development and saying he will do great things; James said he is really looking forward to creating more enjoyable experiences; John offered support, stating anything James needs, he can count on him; James thanked John, saying his support is really appreciated; John replied that no worries, James, and that they make a good team; James added that John has always been there for him and thanked him for having his back.

John commented that the mod looks amazing and the graphics are awesome, and asked what other programming languages James has worked with. James replied that he hasn’t worked with any other programming languages, but he hopes to work with them in the future.

June 13, 2022, 04:30 PM — John: Cool, that sounds awesome; combining your love of gaming and coding sounds like a dream; tell me more; are there any interesting projects you're working on?

John remarked that the advice would help him develop in the game. James added that the whole team gave him autographs, and he was very happy about this: an image of a notepad with a pen and a glass of water. John asked what advice he remembered most; James stated that the most important thing is to communicate correctly with the team and never put your ego above team success: an image of a group of people standing around a table. John noted that comms and teamwork are super important in gaming, and asked how he usually communicates with his team. James replied that he usually uses voice chat to communicate with his team, it’s fast and helps them work together effectively: an image of a man sitting in a chair playing a video game. 【Apex Legends】April 04, 2022, 02:13 PM — John asked what game James likes to play with his team and noted that communication helps. James cannot wait to try new genres and will definitely share thoughts once he tries them. John suggested they chat soon. James will keep John updated on all the new games; John asked to be updated on how it goes.

They give you help and bring their own ideas to the mix. You can achieve so much when everyone works together. Are you working on anything today?"

【GameDev Volunteer Gig】On October 03, 2022, at 09:20 AM, John stated that he had been busy in the weeks and was pushing through, and that he had received an email about a volunteer gig at a game dev non-profit; the gig is something he's wanted to do for a while and could be the perfect start to a career that combines his two loves - gaming and helping - and he is stoked. On October 03, 2022, at 09:20 AM, James replied that the news sounded awesome, that combining his two loves - gaming and helping people - must be really exciting, and asked what kind of gig they offered. 【GameDev Mentorship Initiative】GameDev Mentorship Initiative
Session Date: October 03, 2022

On October 03, 2022, at 09:20 AM, John said he was asked to be a programming mentor for game developers, would teach coding and assist with projects, and was really excited to share his knowledge and motivate people who are passionate about gaming. James replied that mentoring programmers to make games sounds awesome and asked how John felt about starting this journey. John replied that he was excited and inspired, that it's a great chance to help them and boost his own skills, and that he loves sharing what he knows and seeing others reach their potential—it's so rewarding. James said it's rewarding to see how much joy he gets from it and encouraged him to keep going. John thanked James, stating that his support means a lot, that it's fulfilling to use his skills to make a difference, and that he hopes this opens more opportunities for him.
